criteria.description: The landing page now exposes a floating help entry and localized help copy through the bundle contract.
criteria.notes: Bundle coverage now returns `communityHelp` in zh/en and verifies the localized button/title copy.

criteria.description: Users can open the floating help dialog, see the fixed WeChat QR image, and close the dialog through button, overlay, and Escape.
criteria.notes: Integration coverage checks the right-bottom trigger, dialog content, `/community/wechat-group.jpg`, and all three close paths.

criteria.description: The QR asset contract is fixed to `public/community/wechat-group.jpg`, the Journey autoplay control still coexists with the help entry, and the full regression/build pass.
criteria.evidence: public/community/wechat-group.jpg + tests/integration/longpage.spec.tsx + npm test + npm run build
criteria.notes: The static image can be replaced in place for future deployments, and the repo passes 33 tests plus a successful Vite build.
